title: Ranchi University Result 2025

detail.title: Ranchi University Result 2025
detail.short_info: Ranchi University Result 2025: Ranchi University Result 2025 has been released on ranchiuniversity.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your Diploma, B.Com and M.A 4th Semester Results Online.

content.text: Ranchi University Result 2025 is out! Check your Diploma, B.Com and M.A results now on the official website ranchiuniversity.ac.in. Get the direct link to download your Ranchi University Marksheet 2025 here.

sections.heading: Ranchi University Examination 2025 4th Semester Result Overview
How to Check the Ranchi University Results 2025?

items: Visit the Ranchi University website at ranchiuniversity.ac.in.​
Click on the “Students’ Portal” or look for the “Examination Results” section on the homepage.
Select your course and semester from the available options.
Enter your roll number or registration details if prompted.
Submit the form to view and download your result.
Save or print your mark sheet for future use.
